scripts.boundaries: depcruise engine engine2 server web/src workbench/src --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs
scripts.smoke: docker exec fm-test-pg psql -U postgres -c 'DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS smoke_test' -c 'CREATE DATABASE smoke_test' > /dev/null && docker exec -i fm-test-pg psql -U postgres -d smoke_test -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -q < server/schema.sql && docker exec -i fm-test-pg psql -U postgres -d smoke_test -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -q < server/smoke.sql
scripts.test: pnpm typecheck && pnpm boundaries && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:server && pnpm test:web && pnpm harness && pnpm smoke
